pi_items.source: setup_task.sh saves the resized day image to day_bg.png
setup_task.sh saves the resized night image to night_bg.png
task description requires a 24-frame animation and verifier.py checks exactly for 24 output frames.
setup_task.sh uses 'convert -resize 1920x1080!' ensuring the exact dimensions are [1920, 1080]
verifier.py extracts the value from task_info.get('metadata', {}).get('mse_threshold', 50.0).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 24-frame cross-dissolve composite at 1920x1080 resolution, sourcing background images from Wikimedia Commons that are preprocessed and saved as day_bg.png and night_bg.png in /home/ga/OpenToonz/assets. The outputs are generated into /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/dissolve. The transition evaluation tolerates an MSE threshold of 15.0 against expected linear blends.
